# WP Serial Fix

> Serialization-safe search and replace for WordPress data, plus repair for values a bad SQL replace already broke. Runs entirely in the browser.

## Tool

- [WP Serial Fix](https://jaydenyoonzk.github.io/wp-serial-fix/): the tool itself, a static page that runs entirely in the browser with no accounts and no data collection

## Documentation

- [README](https://github.com/JaydenYoonZK/wp-serial-fix#readme): what the tool does, how it works, and its engineering notes
- [Changelog](https://github.com/JaydenYoonZK/wp-serial-fix/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md): dated release history

## Source

- [Repository](https://github.com/JaydenYoonZK/wp-serial-fix): MIT licensed source code
